response.name: Any2Doc
response.description: SDLC 5.0.0 LITE project initialized from vscode

response.name: SDLC-Orchestrator
response.description: Operating System for Software 3.0 | Governance-first platform on SDLC 6.0.3 (7-Pillar + Section 7 Quality Assurance + AI Governance Principles). Features: Quality Gates, Evidence Vault, AI Context Engine, GitHub Bridge, IR-Based Codegen (EP-06), Multi-Provider AI (Ollama→Claude→DeepCode), i18n Infrastructure (Vietnamese/English), VND Pricing (Stripe Integration), Pilot Landing Page. Tech Stack: Python/FastAPI, React/TypeScript (Next.js), PostgreSQL, Redis, OPA, MinIO, Grafana, Prometheus. Status: G3 Ship Ready (98.2% readiness - Dec 12, 2025). Sprint 171: Market Expansion Foundation (90% complete - Vietnamese SME pilot). Target: Vietnam SME Pilot (5 founding customers Q1 2026).

response.name: SDLC-Enterprise-Framework
response.description:
SDLC 4.9.1 Complete Lifecycle Framework documentation and training materials.
Features: 10-Stage Lifecycle, 6 Universal Pillars, Zero Mock Policy, Stage-Gate Templates.
Format: Markdown documentation, policy templates, training guides.
Status: Active documentation. Used by all NQH development teams.

response.name: NQH-Bot Platform
response.description:
AI-powered chatbot platform for enterprise automation. Multi-channel (Telegram, Zalo, Facebook).
Features: Vietnamese NLP, CRM Integration, Analytics Dashboard, Multi-tenant.
Tech Stack: Python/FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, Ollama AI, Redis.
Status: GOLIVE Dec 15, 2025. Target: 10K conversations/day.

response.name: BFlow Platform
response.description:
Multi-tenant HRM platform for Vietnamese enterprises. 200K+ users across 50+ companies.
Features: Payroll, Leave Management, Performance Reviews, Employee Self-Service.
Tech Stack: Python/FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kubernetes.
Status: PRODUCTION since March 2023. SDLC 4.9 showcase project.

response.name: MTEP Platform
response.description: Multi-Tenant Enterprise Platform - SaaS solution for enterprise resource planning with AI-powered insights and real-time analytics.

items.description: Problem validated: 70% of VN SMEs use manual HR processes. Average payroll processing: 8 hours/month.
exit_criteria: Problem statement: Vietnamese SMEs lack affordable HRM
User personas: HR Manager, Employee, Payroll Admin

items.description: Selected: Multi-tenant SaaS with Vietnamese localization. Rejected: On-prem, white-label, marketplace model.
FRD approved: Payroll (BHXH, TNCN), Leave, Performance, Employee Portal. Vietnamese tax compliance built-in.
Microservices architecture. Row-level security for multi-tenancy. Vietnamese encoding (UTF-8 + diacritics).
MVP complete: Payroll, Leave, Employee Portal. 15,000 lines backend, 12,000 lines frontend.
QA complete: 285 test cases, 98% pass rate. Performance: 45ms p50, 120ms p95. UAT with 3 pilot companies.
Blue-green deployment. Kubernetes with auto-scaling. Rollback tested: 3.5 minutes.
Production since Oct 1, 2022. Uptime: 99.95%. Incident response: <15min P1.
Integrated with 5 Vietnamese banks, BHXH portal, eTax system. 50K transactions/month.
Support team: 5 people trained. Documentation: 120 pages. Knowledge base: 200 articles.
Full lifecycle complete. ISO 27001 prep started. GDPR compliant for EU expansion. 200K+ users.
Problem validated: Enterprise chatbots have 40% failure rate in Vietnamese NLP. 70% user drop-off.
exit_criteria: Problem: 40% chatbot failure rate in Vietnamese

items.description: Hybrid AI: Ollama (local, $50/month) + Claude fallback. Multi-channel (Telegram, Zalo, Facebook).
FRD: Multi-channel messaging, Vietnamese NLP, CRM integration, Analytics dashboard.
Event-driven architecture. Ollama integration at api.nhatquangholding.com. Multi-tenant design.
MVP 100% complete. Telegram + Zalo working. Vietnamese NLP: 87% accuracy. Ready for GOLIVE.
GOLIVE Dec 15 target. Deployment to k8s cluster. Load testing: 10K req/min. Awaiting final approval.
Problem: Software teams waste 60-70% of features. SDLC 4.9.1 needs enforcement platform.
exit_criteria: User personas: Dev Team, PM, Executive

items.description: Bridge-first: Governance layer over GitHub/Jira. OPA for Policy-as-Code. MinIO for Evidence Vault.
FRD: Gate Engine, Evidence Vault, AI Context Engine, GitHub Bridge. Contract-first API design.
